From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

School district in Wyoming, United States

**Washakie County School District #1** is a public [school district](/wiki/School_district "School district") based in [Worland](/wiki/Worland,_Wyoming "Worland, Wyoming"), [Wyoming](/wiki/Wyoming "Wyoming"), [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States").

## Geography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Geography")]

Washakie County School District #1 serves the western portion of [Washakie County](/wiki/Washakie_County,_Wyoming "Washakie County, Wyoming"),[[1]](#cite_note-1) including the following communities:

* **[Incorporated places](/wiki/List_of_municipalities_in_Wyoming "List of municipalities in Wyoming")**
  + [City of Worland](/wiki/Worland,_Wyoming "Worland, Wyoming")
* **[Census-designated places](/wiki/List_of_census-designated_places_in_Wyoming "List of census-designated places in Wyoming")** (***Note**: All census-designated places are unincorporated.*)
  + [Airport Road](/wiki/Airport_Road,_Wyoming "Airport Road, Wyoming")
  + [Mc Nutt](/wiki/Mc_Nutt,_Wyoming "Mc Nutt, Wyoming")
  + [South Flat](/wiki/South_Flat,_Wyoming "South Flat, Wyoming")
  + [Washakie Ten](/wiki/Washakie_Ten,_Wyoming "Washakie Ten, Wyoming")
  + [West River](/wiki/West_River,_Wyoming "West River, Wyoming")
  + [Winchester](/wiki/Winchester,_Wyoming "Winchester, Wyoming")

## Schools

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Schools")]

### High school

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: High school")]

* **Grades 9-12**
  + [Worland High School](/wiki/Worland_High_School "Worland High School")

### Middle school

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Middle school")]

* **Grades 6-8**
  + Worland Middle School

### Elementary schools

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Elementary schools")]

* **Grades K-5**
  + East Side Elementary School
  + South Side Elementary School
  + West Side Elementary School

## Student demographics

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Student demographics")]

The following figures are as of October 1, 2019.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

* **Total District Enrollment**: 1,244
* **Student enrollment by gender**
  + Male: 626 (50.32%)
  + Female: 618 (49.68%)
* **Student enrollment by ethnicity**
  + White (not Hispanic): 903 (72.59%)
  + Hispanic: 300 (24.12%)
  + Asian or Pacific Islander: 4 (0.32%)
  + American Indian or Alaskan Native: 10 (0.80%)
  + Black (not Hispanic): 1 (0.08%)
  + Two or more Races: 26 (2.09%)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Washakie_County_School_District_Number_1&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: See also")]
